meta.title: Tsar Simeon Garden Park – Plovdiv, Bulgaria
meta.description: Complete travel guide to Tsar Simeon Garden Park in Plovdiv. Learn about this historic park, including location, attractions, access, and visitor information.

intro.title: Discover Tsar Simeon Garden Park
intro.description: Tsar Simeon Garden Park is one of the most beautiful and historic parks in Plovdiv. Created in the late 19th century, it offers a unique combination of natural beauty, historic architecture, and cultural heritage.

visitGuide.title: Visit Tips
items: Best time to visit is spring when flowers are blooming.
The park is ideal for walks and picnics.
Don't miss the Water Tower and historic statues.

sections.title: History & Creation
sections.content: Tsar Simeon Garden Park was created in 1891-1892 according to the design of the famous Swiss landscape architect Lucien Cheriot. The park is named after Tsar Simeon I, who ruled Bulgaria in the 9th and 10th centuries.

sections.title: Architecture & Design
sections.content: The park was designed in the typical style of its time with wide alleys, decorative ponds, and diverse vegetation. The Water Tower, built in 1891, is one of the symbols of Plovdiv.

sections.title: Location & Nature
sections.content: Located in the center of Plovdiv, the park covers an area of about 18 hectares. It offers cool shade in summer and is a favorite place for walks for both locals and tourists.

sections.title: Preservation & Management
sections.content: The park is maintained by Plovdiv Municipality and is a protected area. Over the years, numerous restorations have been carried out to preserve its historical appearance.

items.question: What are the opening hours of the park?
items.answer: The park is open to visitors year-round, 24 hours a day. There is no entrance fee.

items.question: Is there an entrance fee?
items.answer: No, entrance to Tsar Simeon Garden Park is free for all visitors.

items.question: Are there guided tours available?
items.answer: The park can be explored independently. Information signs in several languages are placed at key locations.

items.question: Is the park accessible for wheelchair users?
items.answer: Yes, the main alleys are flat and accessible for wheelchairs. There are also special paths for people with reduced mobility.

basicInfo.title: Basic Information
basicInfo.officialNameValue: Tsar Simeon Garden Park („Цар Симеонова градина“)

hours.title: Visiting Hours
hours.bestTimeSpring: Spring: Blooming flowers and pleasant weather
hours.bestTimeAutumn: Autumn: Golden colors and mild temperatures
hours.tip: Allow 1-2 hours for a full visit. The park is especially beautiful at sunset.

transport.title: How to Get Here
transport.fromCenterDesc: The park is adjacent to the Central Square and the main pedestrian street (Knyaz Alexander I). It's only a 10-15 minute walk from the Roman Stadium and the Old Town.
transport.fromStationDesc: From Plovdiv Central Railway Station or Bus Station South, it's a 15-20 minute walk or a short bus ride (lines 7, 20, 26) to the center.
transport.fromAirportDesc: Plovdiv is easily accessible from Sofia by bus or train (approx. 2 hours). Plovdiv Airport is about 15 km away and can be reached by taxi.
transport.publicTransportDesc: Many bus lines (e.g., 1, 11, 20) stop near the Central Post Office or Trimontium Hotel, just a few minutes' walk from the park entrances.
transport.walkingDesc: The park is seamlessly connected to other historical sites in the center. Walking is highly recommended as part of a city tour.
transport.drivingDesc: Navigate to ul. „Veliko Tarnovo“ 11A. Note that the city center is mostly a paid parking zone (Blue Zone). Use public parking near the Central Square or Trimontium Hotel.

items.name: Ivan P.
items.text: Wonderful park with rich history. The Water Tower is amazing!

items.name: Maria K.
items.text: One of the most beautiful parks I have visited. Perfect for a walk.

items.name: Georgi S.
items.text: Historic atmosphere and beautiful nature. Recommended for all ages.

items.name: Elena T.
items.text: Lots of greenery and peace. Good place for a family picnic.

items.name: Peter D.
items.text: Unique park with excellent maintenance. Ideal for a morning walk.

items.name: Sveta M.
items.text: One of the symbols of Plovdiv. A must-visit place!

officialManagement.title: About Tsar Simeon Garden Park
officialManagement.text: Tsar Simeon Garden Park is managed and maintained by Plovdiv Municipality. The park is a protected area under Bulgarian cultural heritage laws.
